examples: Fifty-seven years after the Firebird II headlined the GM Motorama, the turbines are no longer needed.
The first Corvette debuted at the GM Motorama in New York City on January 17, 1953, and was an instant sensation.
Sixty years ago yesterday, the Corvette was unveiled in New York at the posh Waldorf Astoria as part of the General Motors Motorama Show.
